result:
All 6 tests pass. There were two bugs, both in `lrucache/cache.py`:

1. **`get` didn't refresh recency** — a hit returned the value without `move_to_end(key)`, so a freshly read entry could still be evicted as the "least recently used". Added the `move_to_end` call on non-expired hits (`cache.py:30`).
2. **`put` evicted on in-place updates** — the eviction check ran even when the key already existed, so overwriting a key in a full cache wrongly evicted another entry. Now it only evicts when inserting a genuinely new key (`cache.py:34`).

`SOLUTION.md` is written with the same explanation, and `python3 -m pytest -q` reports `6 passed`.
